since_last: 42% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.76%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.35% · BTC -1.73% · Gold -1.10% · Nasdaq100 +0.03%. 42% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.76%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.76%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.45%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.45%, ANET +7.88%, SMCI +6.04%, AVGO +5.15%, BIDU +4.97%. Laggards: PANW -4.96%, UPST -4.23%, RXRX -4.14%, WDAY -3.59%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.76% at $145.34
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
